name: large cavern
hints: This cavern has building supplies. The sails and lumber are for building a boat!
GET SAILS and GET LUMBER - you need them to build a raft/boat on the beach. The tool shed has more supplies.
GO SHED to find tools (shovel, hammer, wings). The crack in the rock may connect to the hilltop. Take the building materials.
GET SAILS, GET LUMBER. GO SHED for tools. GO CRACK to reach the hilltop. BUILD BOAT on the beach with these materials. WEST to hallway.
notes: Underground cavern with boat-building materials: sails and precut lumber. Contains the tool shed entrance (room 15) and a crack in the rock connecting to the hilltop. WEST leads to the hallway (room 16). Take materials to beach to BUILD BOAT.
